_meta: 4-reel queue for 2026-06-13 feature-focused pivot. Reel 1 sent to Heath for vibe-check. Reels 2-4 ready to fire on approval.

reel_2_TALK_TO_DOSSIE_LINKEDIN.script: You just left a showing. Your buyer wants to write an offer. Old way: pull out the laptop. Open the form. Fill twenty-seven fields. Dossie way: tell her the address, the price, the terms. She fills the contract. You sign. Twenty-nine dollars a month. Texas agents, meetdossie.com slash founding.
reel_2_TALK_TO_DOSSIE_LINKEDIN.linkedin_note: Long-form caption hook: 'I was sitting in my car after a showing. Buyer wanted to write an offer. 15 minutes of form-filling on a phone keyboard. Or 30 seconds of voice. Watch.' — Algorithm rewards long comments; ask 'What's the longest form-fill you've done from your car?'

reel_3_MORNING_BRIEF_TWITTER.script: Five a.m. Every Monday. Pull up every dossier. Check every deadline. Write tomorrow's to-do list. Or — Dossie sends you a ninety-second audio brief while you drink coffee. Every deal. Every deadline. Every action item. Twenty-nine dollars a month. Texas agents, meetdossie.com slash founding.
reel_3_MORNING_BRIEF_TWITTER.twitter_thread_hook: Old way to prep for Monday: 5 AM. Laptop. Coffee. Hour of digging through 12 open deals. New way:

reel_4_FORM_LIBRARY_YOUTUBE._bite_note: Reusing control bite — closest existing demo to form-library workflow. Consider building dedicated form-library bite later.
reel_4_FORM_LIBRARY_YOUTUBE.script: Resale contract. Financing addendum. Termination notice. Old way: hunt the PDF. Type the buyer name twenty-seven times. Print. Sign. Scan. Email. Dossie way: pick the form. She fills every field from the dossier. Sends it to your signer. Texas agents, twenty-nine dollars a month. Meetdossie.com slash founding.
reel_4_FORM_LIBRARY_YOUTUBE.youtube_title: Auto-Fill TREC Forms in 30 Seconds - Dossie for Texas Agents
reel_4_FORM_LIBRARY_YOUTUBE.youtube_description_first_lines:
Stop hunting PDFs and typing buyer names. Dossie auto-fills TREC resale contracts, financing addenda, and termination notices from your dossier. $29/mo for Texas REALTORs.

meetdossie.com/founding
